hex.description: The raw bytes of the DRep

amount.description: The total amount of voting power this DRep is delegated.

active_epoch.description: Epoch of the most recent registration

has_script.description: Flag which shows if this DRep credentials are a script hash

retired.description: Registration state of the DRep. Set to `true` if the DRep has been deregistered; otherwise, `false`.

expired.description: Whether the DRep has been inactive for a consecutive number of epochs (determined by a epoch parameter `drep_activity`)

last_active_epoch.description: Epoch of the most recent action - registration, update, deregistration or voting
